PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?partner ?professionLabel WHERE {
  ?person p:P166 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P166 ?award .
  VALUES ?award {
    wd:Q35997 wd:Q35998
  }
  .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(year(?date) >= 2019)
  .
  ?person ?partnerProp ?partner .
  VALUES ?partnerProp {
    wdt:P26 wdt:P2415 wdt:P451 wdt:P2523
  }
  .
  ?partner wdt:P106 ?profession .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?profession rdfs:label ?professionLabel .
    FILTER(lang(?professionLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
LIMIT 20
